title: elymus hispidus
intro: Elymus hispidus, also known as hairy wheat grass or meadow wheat grass, is a type of grass native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are said to help soothe digestive issues and reduce stress. The health benefits of Elymus hispidus include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being. Elymus hispidus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory issues.
